name: envi-web
description: ENVI Nord2000 map-authoring frontend (React 19 + Vite + MapLibre). Build/test tooling is devDependencies ONLY — nothing tooling ships in the bundle; the served web/dist is self-contained and fully offline (D-11, zero external assets). Runtime deps (react/maplibre/react-map-gl/terra-draw/zustand/turf) are the only code that reaches the browser.
